---
name: Language proposal
about: Propose a language or architecture change
title: "[PROPOSAL] "
labels: proposal
assignees: ''

---

## Problem

Describe the limitation, ambiguity, contradiction, or missing capability in the current AICL design.

## Proposed change

Describe the precise language, architecture, schema, or workflow change being proposed.

## Why this is better

Explain the gain in rigor, expressiveness, safety, implementability, or scalability.

## Compatibility impact

Explain whether this is:
- backward compatible
- requires migration
- affects examples, schemas, or manuals
